title: Selnesh Imperial Detention Center
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''Selnesh Imperial Detention Center''' was a notorious [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Prison/Legends|prison]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Selnesh/Legends|Selnesh]]. The prison consisted of a single white, domed building.

The [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] successfully [[Mission to Selnesh|rescued]] [[Gebnerret Vibrion]] from the prison.

==Appearances==
*{{JournalCite|10|Do No Harm|reprint=1}} {{Mo}}
